steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: Use the rectangle area formula: the area of a rectangle is length times width. Here, the length is $48$ inches and the width is $32$ inches.

steps.title: Identify the area formula for a rectangle
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is given by $A = \text{length} \times \text{width}$. We are given length = 48 inches and width = 32 inches.

steps.title: Multiply to find the area
steps.content:
$$A = 48 \times 32 = 1,536$$
The area is 1,536 square inches. That confirms D is correct.
